excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Artificial Intelligence lists Final round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-02-26. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 1st round: 6 Oct 2025 (Mon) 2nd round: 17 Nov 2025 (Mon) 3rd round: 29 Dec 2025 (Mon) Final round: 26 Feb 2026 (Thurs) Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been ﬁlled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged.
